name: Stewed Alligator in Creole Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Peeled, seeded, chopped tomatoes (preferably ripe plum tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a saucepan.
2. When the oil is hot, saute onions, celery, and peppers for 1 minute.
3. Add garlic and continue sauteing for 1 minute.
4. Stir in tomatoes, basil, oregano, and thyme.
5. Season with salt, cayenne pepper, and black pepper.
6. Add Worcestershire sauce and chicken stock; bring to a boil.
7. Add green onions and alligator; cover.
8. Simmer the mixture for 12 minutes.
9. Remove from heat; swirl in butter.
10. Spoon stew into shallow bowls.
11. Garnish with parsley.
12. Serve with crusty bread.
This recipe yields 4 appetizer servings.
